answers.question: Where should conformance tests live?
answers.answer: crates/cclab-mamba/tests/conformance/ — co-located with existing mamba tests. Each .py fixture runs on both CPython 3.12 and Mamba.

answers.question: How deep should conformance coverage go for p0 scope?
answers.answer: Full CPython parity — all 33 list methods, all 47 str methods, all generator edge cases. Comprehensive coverage.
